recentCommits.author: NH-Ontik
recentCommits.message:
Restructure sources: remove PDFs, add hyperlinked academic references

- Remove 6 local PDFs from 5_Sources/
- Add 4 comprehensive hyperlinked source hub files:
  - Comprehensive Sources Hub (master index with DOIs, JSTOR, publisher links)
  - Journals and Databases (18 journals, 14 datasets, 10 OA repositories)
  - Institutions and Think Tanks (55+ institutions across 6 regions)
  - Policy Documents and Primary Sources (UN, EU, NATO, ASEAN treaties)
- Update Reading List with hyperlinked references
- Update Realism and Constructivism theory notes with hyperlinked sources
- Update Dashboard to reference hyperlinked sources instead of PDFs
- Update index.md directory tree and navigation (11 sections)
- Update _CLAUDE.md vault structure
- Update daily note to reflect sources restructuring
